home.title: CODING FOR KIDS
home.subtitle: INTRODUCING PROGRAMMING GAMES FOR THE NEXT GENERATION
home.about_paragraph_1: Codey is an award-winning online platform that teaches kids real coding languages like Python and JavaScript. Children and teenagers learn block-based and text-based coding through an engaging game-like environment.
home.about_paragraph_2: Millions of Codey's students are excited about coding. Codey does not require prior coding experience and is designed for home and family use.
home.about_paragraph_3_intro: Do you want to start coding now?
home.about_paragraph_3_body: Kids ages 5 to 14 can learn block coding, text coding, and Python while they play. Children as young as 5 can start programming and build their own games. Try it today!
home.feature1_desc: Kids learn to code by solving fun challenges and building their own games.
home.feature2_desc: Learn Python, CoffeeScript and more - real languages used by professionals.
home.feature3_desc: Track progress, assign challenges, and manage classrooms with ease.
home.parents_desc: With Codey's all-inclusive home plan, your child will learn to code in no time. Codey's courses teach text-based coding so kids learn to program like real developers. It makes coding fun, and no previous experience is needed.
home.curriculum_caption: A fun coding course for kids
home.curriculum_desc: Codey offers educational resources for students of different grades and experience levels. From Codey Jr. to advanced courses, students learn coding basics such as block-based and text-based coding. Kids also learn real programming languages like Python and JavaScript. Through Codey, kids build the skills they need for the future while having fun.
home.awards_title: Get your students coding in no time!
home.awards_desc: Codey is a fun and educational game-based environment where kids learn to code without prior experience. After completing Codey's award-winning coding courses, kids can navigate the programming world with confidence and a sense of accomplishment.
home.features_title:
Kids will love learning to code
with Codey
home.feature_card_ready_desc: With Codey's support team, anyone can learn the basics of computer science and start coding today.
home.feature_card_languages_desc: Codey's courses teach text-based coding so students learn to program like real developers.
home.feature_card_game_desc: Kids learn coding in an engaging and rewarding environment that uses game elements.
home.numbers_desc: What sets Codey apart is its unique approach to teaching children programming from day one in an engaging, gamified way. We believe learning should be fun, and that is exactly what we do.
home.all_in_one_title: All you need in one place
home.progress_tracking_desc: With student solutions, automatic grading, and progress management, Codey's dashboard helps you easily monitor your child's coding journey.
home.standards_alignment_desc: Codey places strong emphasis on content aligned with today's standards. Through online challenges and activities, students develop coding skills as well as computational thinking, collaboration, reasoning, and logic.
home.cta_subtitle: Join millions of kids worldwide - it's completely free!

courses.chatbots_description: Start this course to learn exciting coding concepts!

signup.parent_subtitle: Introduce your child to Computer Science and track their progress

parent.link_child_subtitle: Enter the code your child generated from their dashboard
parent.link_success: {name} has been linked to your account!
parent.link_instructions:
1. Your child logs into their account
2. They click "Share with Parent" in their dashboard
3. They tap "Generate Code" to get a 6-character code
4. Enter that code here to link their account

dashboard.share_with_parent: Share your progress with a parent
dashboard.share_code_hint: Give this code to your parent so they can view your progress
dashboard.discover_hint_message: Challenges are games to play, Assets are items to use in your own games, Favorites are things you saved.
dashboard.no_community_challenges: No community challenges are available yet.
dashboard.no_published_assets: No published user assets are available yet.
dashboard.choose_favorites_filters: Choose Challenges or Assets to show your favorites.
dashboard.no_favorites_yet: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on a challenge or asset to save it here.
dashboard.creations_hint_title: Ready to build your own game?
dashboard.creations_hint_message: Tap "Create New Game" and pick a style — Slides is easiest for beginners, Scratch gives full code control.
dashboard.no_my_challenges: No challenges yet. Create your first one!
dashboard.no_my_assets: No assets yet. Add assets inside a game builder.

parent_dash.welcome_desc: Welcome to your parent dashboard! Here you can view your children's progress and achievements.
parent_dash.start_playing_hint: To start playing, log in to your child's account.
parent_dash.res_all_solutions_desc: View our 3-star solutions for all challenges.
parent_dash.res_coding_concepts_desc: Explore our coding concepts to enhance your understanding.
parent_dash.res_videos_desc: Access our video collection to enhance your understanding of the various concepts.
parent_dash.res_coloring_desc: Download our coloring pages for an enjoyable classroom activity.
parent_dash.res_help_desc: Utilize our help center to find articles on any aspect of our platform you are uncertain about.
parent_dash.res_media_desc: Open our media kit to access and download a collection of adorable character images.
parent_dash.no_children_yet: No children linked yet. Use "Link a child +" to get started.

account.title: MY ACCOUNT
account.hide_discover: Hide Discover and prevent child from publishing games and challenges.
account.turn_off_hints: Turn off Coding Adventure's Super Hints.
account.delete_desc: Click on the button below only if you are sure that you want to delete your account. After deleting your account you will not be able to access the game, your progress or the challenges you created anymore. This action can not be undone. This action will also cancel your auto renewal and you will not be charged again.
account.delete_children_note: By deleting your account, your children's account will be deleted as well.
account.delete_linked_note: By deleting your account, your linked children will be automatically unlinked. Their accounts will not be deleted.
